content: These criteria never improved across 4 iterations and scored <70% — may be unmeasurable or need clearer measurements: logical_replication_configuration, replication_lag_monitoring, comprehensive_health_checks, data_consistency_verification, sequence_and_metadata_migration, migration_state_management, production_deployment_readiness
task: Write a bash script that performs zero-downtime PostgreSQL migration from version 14 to 16 with logical replication, automated rollback, and health checks.
